ValidationRule.description: When an Account is marked as "Data.Ai Overlap" the User cannot check the "Data.Ai/App Annie" checkbox on the Opportunity.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Data_ai_App_Annie__c) && Data_ai_App_Annie__c && Account.Data_Ai_Overlap__c && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && !$User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended" && RecordType.DeveloperName <>"Rank_Ranger"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot check the “App Intelligence” for accounts that are “App Intelligence Overlap/ excluded industry
